name: delete_post
description: Permanently delete a post from Buffer. This action is irreversible. Not all posts can be deleted. Check that deletePost is in the allowedActions array (returned by list_posts and get_post) before attempting deletion. Use list_posts or get_post to find the post ID before deleting.

postId.description: The ID of the post to delete. Use list_posts or get_post to find post IDs.
